name: UnrealGenAISupport
description: Unreal Engine plugin for LLM/GenAI models & MCP UE5 server. Includes OpenAI's GPT, Deepseek, Claude Sonnet/Opus APIs, Google Gemini 3, Alibaba Qwen, Kimi, and Grok 4.1, with plans to add TTS, Elevenlabs, Inworld, OpenRouter, Groq, GLM, seedream hunyuan3d, fal, Dashscope, Rodin, Meshy, Tripo, UnrealClaude soon. UnrealMCP is also here!!
